response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal phonetics closely match the reference lyrics for 'Orchestra' (originally by BiSH), with some minor variations tailored to the performance version.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided reference lyrics for transcription and translation, refining the segmentation to match the performers' phrasing.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles precisely to the vocal onset and offset, adding the on-screen song credits during the instrumental section.

subtitles.original: 見上げて あの夜空に
subtitles.english: I looked up at that night sky,

subtitles.original: 浮かぶ星たち
subtitles.english: And the stars floating there.

subtitles.original: ふっと君の声が
subtitles.english: Suddenly, I heard your voice...

subtitles.original: あの頃 輝いてたかな
subtitles.english: Was it shining back then?

subtitles.original: 今になっては
subtitles.english: Now that it's come to this,

subtitles.original: ずっと わからないまま
subtitles.english: I'll never know.

subtitles.original: オーケストラ\n作詞: JxSxK / 松隈ケンタ  作曲: 松隈ケンタ
subtitles.english: [Song: Orchestra / Lyrics: JxSxK, Kenta Matsukuma / Composition: Kenta Matsukuma]

subtitles.original: あの時
subtitles.english: Back then,

subtitles.original: 君がついた嘘
subtitles.english: The lie you told,

subtitles.original: 問いただせずに泣いたあの坂道
subtitles.english: I couldn't question it, crying on that hill.

subtitles.original: この先
subtitles.english: From here on,

subtitles.original: 君と会えないの？
subtitles.english: Will I never see you again?

subtitles.original: 離れ離れに身を任せていた
subtitles.english: I had resigned myself to our being apart.

subtitles.original: いつもの後悔が 風に消えてく
subtitles.english: My usual regrets are vanishing in the wind.

subtitles.original: 誰にも見せないその姿を
subtitles.english: The side of you that you'd never show anyone else,

subtitles.original: もう少しだけ見ていたかったんだ
subtitles.english: I wanted to see it just a little more.

subtitles.original: 時がそっと睨んでいる
subtitles.english: Time is silently glaring at us.

subtitles.original: その手と手繋いで
subtitles.english: Holding hands with you,

subtitles.original: 笑い合っていた声 忘れはしないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget the voices of us laughing together.

subtitles.original: こんなにも流してた
subtitles.english: All these tears that were flowing,

subtitles.original: 涙も 語る声も
subtitles.english: Even the tears and speaking voices,

subtitles.original: オーケストラ
subtitles.english: Are an orchestra.

subtitles.original: やがて訪れたよね
subtitles.english: It eventually came, didn't it?

subtitles.original: さよならの声 忘れはしないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget the voice of goodbye.

subtitles.original: あんまりにも近くにいたはずだ
subtitles.english: We should have been so close,

subtitles.original: 今では繋がりなんて
subtitles.english: But now, our only connection

subtitles.original: あの空だけ
subtitles.english: Is that sky above.

subtitles.original: 夜空の言葉にしよう
subtitles.english: Let's put it into words of the night sky.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿らしくなって投げた午前3時
subtitles.english: Getting silly, we threw away that 3 AM.

subtitles.original: これから先
subtitles.english: From here on,

subtitles.original: 君と何年も
subtitles.english: Even years with you,

subtitles.original: 時の流れに身を任せても
subtitles.english: Even if I leave myself to the flow of time,

subtitles.original: いつものジョークが街に消えてく
subtitles.english: Our usual jokes are vanishing into the city.

subtitles.original: 誰にも見せない僕の姿を
subtitles.english: My side that I'd never show anyone else,

subtitles.original: もう少しだけ見せたかったんだ
subtitles.english: I wanted to show you just a little more.

subtitles.original: 時がそっと睨んでいる
subtitles.english: Time is silently glaring at us.

subtitles.original: この目と目合わせて
subtitles.english: With our eyes meeting,

subtitles.original: はっきりとしたい
subtitles.english: I want to make it clear,

subtitles.original: もうできないかな
subtitles.english: I guess I can't do that anymore.

subtitles.original: こんなにも遠く近くで辛いのを
subtitles.english: It hurts so much to be so far, yet so close,

subtitles.original: 音奏でる オーケストラ
subtitles.english: As the orchestra plays its sound.

subtitles.original: どこで何をしてるの
subtitles.english: Where are you now, what are you doing?

subtitles.original: わからないのは
subtitles.english: The fact that I don't know...

subtitles.original: 僕のせいなんだね
subtitles.english: Is my fault, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 永遠にこんな日が来るなんて
subtitles.english: That days like this would last forever,

subtitles.original: 神様いたずらなら呪いたいぐらい
subtitles.english: If this is God's prank, I want to curse Him.

subtitles.original: その手と手繋いで
subtitles.english: Holding hands with you,

subtitles.original: 笑い合っていた声 忘れはしないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget the voices of us laughing together.

subtitles.original: こんなにも流してた
subtitles.english: All these tears that were flowing,

subtitles.original: 涙も 語る声も オーケストラ
subtitles.english: Even the tears and speaking voices, are an orchestra.

subtitles.original: やがて訪れたよね
subtitles.english: It eventually came, didn't it?

subtitles.original: さよならの声 忘れはしないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget the voice of goodbye.
